Selected industry

Railway & Traction

Vibration-tolerant magnetics, traction-grade transformers, locomotive and driver-desk panels, onboard converters and protection relays. Designed and tested against IRS, RDSO and IEC requirements.

Application examples
  • Traction transformers and reactors
  • Locomotive control panels
  • Driver desk consoles
  • Auxiliary converter magnetics
  • Onboard protection and display
Typical buyer need

Rolling stock OEMs, traction integrators, signalling contractors and rail operators.

Quality or testing consideration

Vibration, impulse and temperature rise tests where applicable. IRS, RDSO and IEC conformance based on tender requirement.

Relevant product groups
Industry deep dive

Six sectors, one engineering approach.

Detailed view of each industry served: applications, relevant product groups and how to start a conversation.

01

Railway & Traction

Vibration-tolerant magnetics, traction-grade transformers, locomotive and driver-desk panels, onboard converters and protection relays. Designed and tested against IRS, RDSO and IEC requirements.

Typical buyer need

Rolling stock OEMs, traction integrators, signalling contractors and rail operators.

Quality or testing consideration
Vibration, impulse and temperature rise tests where applicable. IRS, RDSO and IEC conformance based on tender requirement.
Application examples
  • Traction transformers and reactors
  • Locomotive control panels
  • Driver desk consoles
  • Auxiliary converter magnetics
  • Onboard protection and display
Relevant product groups
02

Renewable Sectors

Inverter chokes, harmonic filter reactors, grid-tie transformers and balance-of-plant components for utility-scale solar, wind and battery storage. Designed for 25-year project life and full type testing.

Typical buyer need

Renewable EPC contractors, inverter OEMs, IPP owners and utilities.

Quality or testing consideration
Routine tests on every unit. Type tests for thermal endurance and partial discharge, where applicable. Documentation aligned with EPC handover requirements.
Application examples
  • Solar inverter magnetics
  • String-level chokes
  • Wind converter components
  • Grid-tie transformers
  • Substation panels and protection
Relevant product groups
03

Power & Utilities

Type-tested transformers, reactors, distribution panels, float and boost chargers and protection assemblies meeting IEC and IS requirements for distribution networks, industrial substations and captive power plants.

Typical buyer need

Utilities, T&D EPC contractors and industrial substation owners.

Quality or testing consideration
IEC 60076 and IEC 61439 routine tests. Type tests through accredited labs, where applicable. Third-party inspection ready.
Application examples
  • MV distribution transformers
  • Harmonic filter reactors
  • Substation panels and PDUs
  • Float cum boost chargers
  • Auxiliary supply systems
Relevant product groups
04

Heavy Industries

Isolation transformers, MV switchgear interfaces, drive cabinets and PDUs for plant electrification. Engineered for heavy duty cycles and built to customer QAP frameworks.

Typical buyer need

Process plant owners, machine builders and EPC contractors for heavy industry.

Quality or testing consideration
Customer QAP and stage inspection. Routine tests on every assembly. Material traceability available on request.
Application examples
  • Drive and motor control cabinets
  • Isolation transformers
  • Plant PDUs
  • Servo power supplies
  • Process automation panels
Relevant product groups
05

Material Handling & Warehousing

High-frequency chargers and battery management systems for 24 / 7 fleet operations. Built for opportunity charging, multi-chemistry compatibility and fleet management integration.

Typical buyer need

Material handling equipment OEMs, fleet operators and warehouse logistics providers.

Quality or testing consideration
Functional, efficiency and burn-in tests, where applicable. Conformance to chemistry-specific charging profiles. Optional third-party inspection.
Application examples
  • Forklift fleet charging
  • AGV depots
  • Cold-chain warehousing
  • E-commerce fulfilment centres
Relevant product groups
06

Data Centers

K-rated transformers, IT-grade PDUs, UPS units and busbar systems for data centre power chains. Supplied with documentation aligned to customer reliability and audit requirements.

Typical buyer need

Data centre operators, colocation providers and critical-power EPC contractors.

Quality or testing consideration
IEC 61439 routine tests on assemblies. K-factor verification on magnetics, where applicable. Documentation prepared for audit and acceptance.
Application examples
  • K-rated isolation transformers
  • IT power distribution
  • UPS and battery backup
  • Busbar trunking
  • Auxiliary protection
Relevant product groups
RFQ and enquiry

Send a specification. Get an engineering response in one business day.

Share your application, ratings, environment and timeline. Our engineering team replies with feasibility, indicative pricing and the relevant datasheets.

Magnetics, control panels, power electronics and cross-segment components. Engineered in India for industrial, power, railway, renewable and material handling applications worldwide.
